violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): A few wet-stained ceiling tiles noted in front service and dining areas need replaced. ( also- repair any water leaks above these tiles) Ceiling vent covers in front service area noted in need of cleaning.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. ( lids are up )
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Some wire-type shelving inside walkin cooler noted not in good repair rusting.

COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately. Meat and poultry removed at this time. ***Not to be used until repaired or replaced.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Can opener not properly maintained needs routine cleaning.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): A couple coolers noted with no thermometer.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling vent over handsink in kitchen area needs cleaning. Wall over urinal in restroom needs repair.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Mens restroom door noted not self closing.
